title: clerodendrum grandiflorum
intro: Clerodendrum grandiflorum, also known as the Glory Bower or Autumn Glory, is a flowering plant native to tropical Asia, belonging to the family Lamiaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. The health benefits of Clerodendrum grandiflorum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and protect against cardiovascular diseases. The herbal preparations of this plant can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to soothe coughs, calm digestive issues, and promote overall well-being.
